nodes.label: documentId vs id (Strapi v5)
nodes.contributor: rationale: documentId is stable across migrations; id is internal DB row — use documentId for permalinks

nodes.label: On-demand ISR Revalidation via Webhook
nodes.contributor: rationale: fire webhook on entry.publish/update to purge edge cache, supplementing 60s revalidate interval

nodes.label: Polymorphic Link/Button Pattern
nodes.contributor: rationale: href provided renders anchor (internal=next/link, external=raw a); omitted renders button — enforces correct semantics for right-click open-in-tab

nodes.label: Strapi Migration Plan (Payload to Strapi v5)
nodes.norm_label: strapi migration plan (payload to strapi v5)

nodes.label: Payload CMS Removal
nodes.contributor: rationale: owner moved to fully operational Strapi v5 server; remove all Payload code to reduce complexity and eliminate D1/Neon dependency

nodes.label: D1 Migration Design (Neon to Cloudflare D1)
nodes.author: Aayushman
nodes.norm_label: d1 migration design (neon to cloudflare d1)

nodes.label: Single-vendor Cloudflare Stack Rationale
nodes.contributor: rationale: move Workers+R2+DB all to Cloudflare ecosystem for single-vendor operations, faster edge reads, remove cross-cloud network hop
